human_verification.notes: Reviewed source discipline, boundary safety, escalation routing, and evidence-traceability expectations for elder-care and disability reporting/disclosure scenarios.

specialist_owned_evidence: Manifest defines explicit in-scope reporting/disclosure tasks and strict boundary refusals.
Research summary links regulatory, workflow, evidence, and disclosure sources for each failure mode and stage.
Functionality-map covers shared, workflow-phase, and industry-profile abilities with full scenario coverage.
Evaluation scenarios explicitly test policy exceptions, missing prerequisites, handoffs, conflicts, and unsupported claims.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were introduced in this package iteration.
Scenario coverage is complete and aligns with issue-required families and workflow families.

notes: This package is intended to be validated as a specification-based specialist lane with explicit escalation and refusal behavior.
Next step for retained-implementation runtime is a separate, reviewed artifact pipeline promotion.
